name: d2m-travel-skills
description: Travel operations skills for luxury travel agencies — itinerary building, cruise pricing, client dossiers, invoice reconciliation, and portal emails.
author: Dreams2Memories Travel, LLC

plugins.name: itinerary-builder
plugins.description: Construct multi-day luxury trip itineraries from supplier data, verify timing and transfers, output branded PDF.

plugins.name: cruise-cost-compare
plugins.description: Pull cabin prices from multiple cruise lines, compare amenities, flag best-value options for client presentation.

plugins.name: invoice-reconciler
plugins.description: Match supplier invoices against client bookings, flag discrepancies, produce reconciliation report.

plugins.name: trip-dossier-generator
plugins.description: Compile client trip dossier from booking data, supplier contacts, hotel confirmations, and travel documents.

plugins.name: client-portal-emailer
plugins.description: Draft and send personalized portal activation emails with trip details in D2M stationery.

compatibility: Claude Code 2.0+, Claude Cowork, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Goose
